name: Sofia R.
quote: My nails looked clean, elegant, and lasted beautifully. The attention to detail around the cuticle work was exactly what I wanted.

name: Valentina M.
quote: The booking process was easy, I uploaded my inspo photo, and my reservation felt organized from start to finish. I already booked my next set.

name: Camila P.
quote: I came in for a gel pedicure and left feeling completely taken care of. The space, the finish, and the overall experience were all on point.
